name: Sourdough Skillet Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine corn meal and milk in a mixing bowl.
2. Add eggs, sugar, and Sourdough Starter. Beat well.
3. Add butter, salt, and baking soda, stirring until blended.
4. Spoon the batter into a greased heavy skillet (about 10 inches diameter).
5. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) about 1/2 hour until crusty and nicely browned.
6. Serve hot, cut into generous wedges. Great with milk.
